title: 2 Syracuse football recruits face charges for late-night assault in Philly
summary: Two Syracuse University football recruits were charged with assault following a late-night incident in Philadelphia involving a man and woman waiting for rideshare. This story involves reputational risk to a major local institution and potential public safety implications relevant to City leadership awareness.

political_signal.description: Criminal charges involving student-athletes from major local university may generate institutional scrutiny and community attention; incident occurred outside city jurisdiction (Philadelphia) but carries reputational implications for Syracuse.

processing_notes: Article concerns external jurisdiction (Philadelphia); limited direct City of Syracuse operational impact
Syracuse University is constituent organization but not City department
